backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the STYO platform that wires together authorization, blob storage, and Stripe mixins, and defines core data types and state for user profiles, property listings, bookings, and owner unlock requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: fixing the broken logo image path in Header.tsx and Footer.tsx to use the correct PNG asset path compatible with production builds.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of components, pages, hooks, and styles in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables, plus base body and border styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph and Twitter card metadata, favicon links, and a root div that mounts the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, listings, admin, profile, policy pages, etc.) wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider with a dark default theme.
frontend/src/components/AvailabilityCoun: Displays a live availability counter grid showing counts for PG Rooms, Family Flats, Hotels, and Marriage Halls fetched via a query hook, with loading skeleton and glassmorphism styling.
frontend/src/components/BookingSteps.tsx: Renders a three-step booking guide (View Info, Unlock Owner, Contact) with category-specific icons and styled glassmorphism cards.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedListings: Fetches and displays featured property listings in a responsive grid using ListingCard with cycling visual variants, showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick links, legal links, social media icons, and contact email, using a dark glassmorphism style.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with logo, nav links, conditional admin/profile/my-properties buttons, and Internet Identity login/logout handling.
Renders an interactive India map section with city markers showing Kolkata as active and other major cities as coming soon, with animated glow and ripple effects.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping pages with Header, Footer, and a ProfileSetupModal that appears when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard.tsx: A memoized React component that renders a property listing card with support for three visual variants (neumorphism, glassmorphism, gradient), displaying availability status, category icon, star rating, review count, and a navigation button to the listing detail page.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard3D.ts: A 3D-styled listing card component with hover rotation and float animation effects, showing property image, availability, category icon, ratings, and a details navigation button.
frontend/src/components/ListingDetailMod: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: A memoized decorative map section component that renders animated location pins and floating info badges using event marker data from a query hook, with a grid-pattern background.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects new user profile information (name, email, phone, owner status) and saves it via a mutation hook, shown as a required onboarding step.
frontend/src/components/PropertyStatusBa: A badge component that displays a property's status (available, visit completed, under confirmation, booked via STYO) with a corresponding icon and color scheme.
frontend/src/components/ReviewSection.ts: A component that displays reviews for a listing and provides an authenticated form for submitting a star rating and comment, with toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: A reusable star rating display component that supports three sizes, partial fills, and optional interactive mode for selecting a rating via click.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialBubbl: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/TrustBadge.tsx: A memoized React component that renders an SVG trust badge with four variants (verified, featured, premium, elite), each with distinct gradient colors and glow effects, in three sizes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available or falling back to anonymous, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, listings, reviews, event markers, and other data types.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with an OKLCH-based dark color system, and defines custom GPU-accelerated keyframe animations and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUsPage.tsx: A static About Us page displaying STYO's company description, MSME registration details, and leadership team cards with gradient styling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard page that displays users, listings, lead views, notifications, city charge settings, and pending submissions with controls for quick publish, free trial mode toggle, and bulk city charge updates.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPolicyPage.tsx: Static informational page rendering the platform's booking policy and terms, including sections on platform disclaimer, dispute resolution, payments, and privacy within a styled scrollable card layout.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryWorldPage.tsx: Page displaying a grid of all listing categories (PG Hostel, Family Flat, Hotel, etc.) with images and descriptions, navigating to the listings page filtered by the selected category on click.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring memoized category and stay-type card grids, lazy-loaded availability counter and India map section, and navigation to filtered listing pages.
frontend/src/pages/ListingPage.tsx: Listings browse page that fetches and displays all or category-filtered listings using lazy-loaded 3D cards and a map section, with a category dropdown filter that syncs with URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a styled Privacy Policy page explaining STYO's data collection, sharing, and user rights policies. Uses a scrollable card layout with icons and sections covering data privacy, information collected, and user controls.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the authenticated user's profile (name, email, phone, owner status) using Internet Identity. Supports saving changes to the backend and logging out.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyManagementPag: Allows authenticated property owners to view, create, and edit their listings via dialogs with a form. Filters all listings to show only those owned by the current user and supports status updates.
frontend/src/pages/PublicPropertySubmiss: Provides a public form for submitting a new property listing without authentication, including image uploads, property details, and owner contact info. Validates inputs and calls the submitPublicListing mutation on submission.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a styled Refund Policy page detailing the conditions under which the ₹99 unlock fee is refundable. Uses a scrollable card layout with icon-labeled sections for eligible and non-eligible refund cases.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditionsPage.t: Renders the STYO Terms & Conditions page with styled sections covering platform disclaimer, dispute resolution, user responsibilities, and other legal content using a dark glassmorphism UI.
frontend/src/pages/UnlockPage.tsx: Displays a property listing detail page where authenticated users can unlock owner contact information, download contact details, and initiate calls or WhatsApp messages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, box shadows, background images, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the STYO project's current state at version 3, recording a known production bug where the navbar logo image fails to load, along with existing fix features and a pending task to ensure the logo asset is present in the build output.
